message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I have the account ending in 1184 with a current amount due of 8400. Please confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
The last 2 digits are 02, but I still can’t pay right now.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Verification is complete. I have the account ending in 1184 with a current amount due of 8400. You indicated you cannot pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days. I’m unemployed right now and can’t commit to a payment.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Verification is complete. I have the account ending in 1184 with a current amount due of 8400. You reported unemployment, no income, and no expected income within 21 days. I will note ongoing hardship and hardship review needed. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.
